name: Reasonable Medical Care Draper

mainEntity.name: Definition: What counts as "reasonable medical care" in Draper UT comp?
mainEntity.text: Definition: What counts as "reasonable medical care" in Draper UT comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor-recommended treatments causally related to injury, pre-approved by insurer[1].

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper: Includes surgery, therapy if evidenced. Deny experimental—appeal[1][3].

description: Doctor-recommended treatments causally related to injury, pre-approved by insurer[1].
